items.title: [正面] O jogo é excelente, tanto em efeitos musicais quan...
items.summary: O jogo é excelente, tanto em efeitos musicais quanto em gráfico. Como sugestão, gostaria carinhosamente que adicionasse a tradução em Português do Brasil (PT-BR).

items.title: [正面] Loved this, if you find turn based games that focu...
items.summary: Loved this, if you find turn based games that focus a lot on strategy  to be your jam, then this is definitely for you; The only thing I could complain about is the wonky english translation, but tbh it's not that much of an issue, after all, you can still follow the story quite easily.

items.title:
[正面] [h1] Morimens [/h1]

[h3] Pros: [/h3] [b]🕹️ Engagi...
items.summary:
[h1] Morimens [/h1]

[h3] Pros: [/h3] [b]🕹️ Engaging Gameplay [/b] I think Morimens excels in providing engaging gameplay. The combination of strategy and action keeps the game exciting and challenging, making each playthrough a rewarding experience. 🕹️🔥

[b]🎨 Unique Visuals [/b] The game features unique and eye-catching visuals. The artistic style is distinct and adds to the overall atmosphere, making it visually memorable. The character and environment designs are both creative and appealing. 🎨🖼️

[b]🎵 Dynamic Soundtrack [/b] The soundtrack is dynamic and fitting for the game’s tone. The music and sound effects enhance the gameplay experience and contribute to the game’s immersive qualities. 🎵🎶

[b]🧩 Strategic Depth [/b] The game offers significant strategic depth, allowing for diverse approaches to challenges. The depth in strategy adds layers of complexity and replayability, which is great for players who enjoy tactical thinking. 🧩🧠

[b]🌍 Expansive World [/b] The world of Morimens is expansive and well-designed. The environments are varied and interesting to explore, contributing to the sense of adventure and discovery throughout the game. 🌍🌟

[h3] Cons: [/h3] [b]📉 Pacing Issues [/b] One downside is the pacing, which can feel uneven at times. Certain segments might drag on, affecting the overall flow of the game. Smoothing out these pacing issues could enhance the experience. 📉⏳

[b]🔄 Limited Content [/b] I feel the content can be somewhat limited. While the core gameplay is solid, additional content or features could help keep the game fresh and engaging over time. Expanding the game with more variety could be beneficial. 🔄📜

[h3] Other Drawbacks: [/h3] [b]🔧 Technical Glitches [/b] Personally, I encountered some technical glitches, such as occasional bugs or performance hiccups. These issues can interrupt the gameplay experience and detract from the immersion. Regular updates and patches could address these problems. ⚠️🔧

[b]🌐 Lack of Social Interaction [/b] The game lacks social interaction features. Adding options for players to connect, share strategies, or compete with each other could enhance the overall experience and provide additional enjoyment. 🌐👥

[b]Good Points[/b]
[list]
[*]Engaging gameplay.
[*]Unique visuals.
[*]Dynamic soundtrack.
[*]Strategic depth.
[*]Expansive world.
[/list]

[b]Bad Points[/b]
[list]
[*]Pacing issues.
[*]Limited content.
[*]Technical glitches.
[*]Lack of social interaction.
[/list]

[table]
    [tr]
        [th]Category[/th]
        [th]Score[/th]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]Graphics[/td]
        [td]⭐⭐⭐⭐[/td]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]Gameplay[/td]
        [td]⭐⭐⭐⭐[/td]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]Sound[/td]
        [td]⭐⭐⭐⭐[/td]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]Content[/td]
        [td]⭐⭐⭐[/td]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]Overall Rating[/td]
        [td]⭐⭐⭐⭐[/td]
    [/tr]
[/table]

[b]Personal Comment[/b] Morimens offers engaging gameplay with its unique visuals, dynamic soundtrack, and strategic depth. The expansive world and creative design make it a memorable experience.

However, pacing issues, limited content, and technical glitches can affect the overall enjoyment. The lack of social interaction features also limits the game’s replayability and community engagement. 

Overall, Morimens is a solid game for fans of strategy and action. If you appreciate well-designed worlds and engaging gameplay, it’s definitely worth checking out.

items.summary:
Very good game
Good voice acting, music, art, character designs, gameplay, writing

The machine translation gets a little confusing sometimes, but it's understandable

My only issue is having to set my computer's region to enUS to have any game audio, hope that gets fixed

items.title: [正面] An interesting game in the Lovecraftian setting. G...
items.summary:
An interesting game in the Lovecraftian setting. Gameplay similar to slay the spire/reverse 1999.

Pros:
+Art is great
+Story is not bad
+Gameplay is good
+PVP is deep and interesting (and not p2w). It's just different game where everyone is equal. You don't have to do it to get rewards
+Game really become better with latest updates

Cons:
-The game really doesn't want you to play and go through the storyline. Very high difficulty in storymode
-Some events usually are only for whales or old players. New player literally can't play because they are low lvl with low stats
-Updates are very rare. Three to four characters were released in six months
-The game counts on your FOMO
-Worst. Gear. System. Ever. I would praise mihoyo gear system if we compare it to morimens
-Game didn't respect your time. You can waste 30-60 min and got nothing in return cuz boss counters your team.
-Chatgpt. Chatgpt. Chatgpt. There has been no English translation for a year and a half. 
-PVP is unbalanced af. (meta aoe damage that wipe your team, most of players playing same characters. Some cards are absurd in power compared to other). Gamemode is abandoned.

items.title: [正面] El juego esta bueno, buen arte, buena banda sonora...
items.summary:
El juego esta bueno, buen arte, buena banda sonora. De momento esta muy generoso con los pulls. El gameplay con las cartas esta bueno, son lo suficientemente claras como para darte una idea rapida de posibles estrategias. 

Cosa a recalcar son los char, personalmente es un 10/10 tanto el arte como el doblaje.  Respecto a la traducción esta echo con IA, pero se entiende y no hay muchos errores.

Las dailys se hacen en 2 pedos, no tardas ni 5min, asi que la opcion de tenerlo como un gacha alt siempre esta ahi si lo queres viciar de chill.

Básicamente, propalo y fíjate.
